participantIDCreationFormatSpec.label: Participant ID Format
participantIDCreationFormatSpec.subLabel: The participant number is represented using the ‘#’ for numbers and ‘@’ for letters. Place pre-configured prefixes or suffixes in brackets (ex. {SITE}####)
participantIDCreationFormatSpec.toolTipGuide: The format can include {SITE}, {COUNTRY}, or {PROTOCOL} and the system will automatically insert the ID for the site that enrolls the participant, the country code or the alphanumeric study protocol as part of the participant ID.
